explanation: This command uses insertion (quotes) and reordering (rearranging flags) to test if the Sigma rule can detect the execution of manage-bde.wsf via wscript.exe. The command is benign as it does not perform any malicious action but simulates the structure of a potential abuse scenario.

This command uses substitution (replacing '-' with '/') for flag syntax to test if the Sigma rule can detect the execution of manage-bde.wsf via wscript.exe. The command is safe as it only queries help information.
This command tests the basic execution of manage-bde.wsf via wscript.exe without additional flags. It is safe as it does not perform any action unless further parameters are provided.
